source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/13. Manufacturing/HAD1717MG Manufacture 작업공정도.pdf

document.title: 제조공정도 / Process Manufacture Control Plan
document.documentType: Manufacturing process flow and process manufacture control plan

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturing process flow and control plan for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG covering incoming materials through shipment.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports manufacturing control documentation by defining process steps, equipment/JIGs, materials, inspection criteria, control cycles, records, and related standards.
keyPoints: Document identifies Rev.0 and a manufacturing process flow dated 2019.03.20.
The control plan lists Model HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.

Process steps include material incoming/preparation, Power Box assembly, IQC, G/T inspection, scintillator bonding, OLB, microscope inspection, tape attachment, Tuffy coating, X-ray image inspection, assembly, aging test, final test, external inspection, electrical safety inspection, operation inspection, labeling and packing, packing inspection, and shipment.
Electrical safety inspection includes leakage current, dielectric withstand, grounding resistance, and power input tests.
Final test includes X-ray image inspection and detector performance inspection such as DQE, MTF, and NPS.

evidence.claim: The document is a manufacturing process flow document dated 2019.03.20.
The revision history states the work instruction was initially established on 2019.03.19.
The process manufacture control plan document number is A-PMCP-5-001.
The control plan applies to models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
The manufacturing process includes material incoming/preparation as the first process.
The manufacturing process includes IQC incoming inspection.
evidence.evidenceText:
3 • IQC (수입 검사) • 수입검사 JIG
• 입고품 입고검사

evidence.claim: The manufacturing process includes scintillator bonding using a GdOS Bonder.
The manufacturing process includes X-ray image inspection for defects, operation status, and noise.

• X-ray 영상 검사

evidence.claim: Aging Test applies 25℃ with 2000 dark images.
Final Test includes X-ray image inspection and detector performance inspection for DQE, MTF, and NPS.

evidence.claim: Labeling and packing covers product label attachment, sealed packaging, accessory packaging, box packaging, box label attachment, and seal sticker attachment.

reviewFlags.reason: Header fields for document number, establishment date, revision date, and revision number appear blank, although later text lists document number A-PMCP-5-001 and Rev.0.
Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text.
Source text order appears interleaved between the manufacturing process flow and the process manufacture control plan, so some table relationships may require source PDF review.
